metadata.name: compliance_hook
metadata.description: AgroGlobalDex Token-2022 Transfer Hook enforcing KYC + jurisdiction policy

instructions.name: execute
docs: Token-2022 transfer hook entrypoint. Verifies both source and
destination wallets have valid `ComplianceRecord`s and that neither
jurisdiction is in the policy blocklist.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: ExtraAccountMetaList — Token-2022 ALWAYS appends this account at index
4 of the Execute instruction. Validation that the resolved extra
accounts match the TLV layout happens implicitly via Token-2022's
resolver before we get here.

accounts.name: marketplace
docs: The marketplace account — only its key is checked against hook_config.

accounts.name: agroglobaldex_program
docs: The agroglobaldex program — needed by the TLV resolver so PDA seeds
resolve against it.

accounts.name: jurisdiction_policy
docs: JurisdictionPolicy account, owned by `agroglobaldex_program`.

accounts.name: source_compliance
docs: Source's ComplianceRecord, owned by `agroglobaldex_program`.

accounts.name: destination_compliance
docs: Destination's ComplianceRecord, owned by `agroglobaldex_program`.

instructions.name: initialize_extra_account_meta_list
docs: Wire up the per-mint validation data. Called once per AgroGlobalDex
mint, right after the mint itself is created. The caller is the main
program (signing for the `asset_registry` PDA acting as the mint
authority) — but for Anchor IDL friendliness the signer is the
`authority` account, which we validate to be the mint authority on the
client side (Token-2022 only checks the signature; the seeds bind the
account to the mint).

accounts.name: mint
docs: The Token-2022 mint these metas apply to.

accounts.name: hook_config
docs: Per-mint config carrying marketplace pubkey + the agroglobaldex program id.

accounts.name: extra_account_meta_list
docs: The ExtraAccountMetaList account. Created manually below to avoid the
fixed-size limitation of Anchor `init`.

errors.name: SourceKycNotVerified
errors.msg: Source wallet has not passed KYC

errors.name: DestKycNotVerified
errors.msg: Destination wallet has not passed KYC

errors.name: SourceJurisdictionBlocked
errors.msg: Source jurisdiction is blocked by the marketplace policy

errors.name: DestJurisdictionBlocked
errors.msg: Destination jurisdiction is blocked by the marketplace policy

errors.name: AccountOwnerMismatch
errors.msg: Account is not owned by the agroglobaldex program

errors.name: DeserializationFailed
errors.msg: Failed to deserialize the compliance/policy account

errors.name: JurisdictionPolicyMismatch
errors.msg: JurisdictionPolicy account is not the expected PDA for this marketplace

errors.name: SourceComplianceMismatch
errors.msg: Source ComplianceRecord is not the expected PDA for the source owner

errors.name: DestComplianceMismatch
errors.msg: Destination ComplianceRecord is not the expected PDA for the destination owner

errors.name: DiscriminatorMismatch
errors.msg: Account discriminator does not match the expected type

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint this config refers to.

fields.name: marketplace
docs: AgroGlobalDex marketplace account this mint lives under. Used as a
seed component when resolving compliance/policy PDAs.

fields.name: agroglobaldex_program
docs: AgroGlobalDex main program id — used to resolve external PDAs.
